rulings.Case Title: WENDY HENRIQUEZ VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs After Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 20, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF WENDY HENRIQUEZ Amended Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs After Appeal is DENIED, untimely. Remittitur in this action was issued on October 3, 2019. This motion was filed on December 6, 2019 after the original motion was taken off calendar for insufficient notice. While original motion was filed within 40 days of remittitur it was not noticed in compliance with CCP 1005 and CCP 1010.6. Motion was allegedly served by mail and e-service on November 11, 2019 for a hearing on December 6, 2019; there are 3 court holidays in the month of November; the latest date for service by mail or e-service was November 7, 2019. Furthermore, it appears, based on the register of actions, that Defendant as of November 11, 2020 and December 6, 2020 was in pro per. POS for November 11, 2020 indicates service on counsel only. There is no POS for December 6, 2019 filings filed on December 6, 2019. Instead on December 6, 2019 a POS dated December 6, 2019 was filed indicating service of the original motion on November 11, 2019 on counsel only by mail, fax, and e-service. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW EBRAHIMOON VS. GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 20, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW EBRAHIMOON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Triable issues of fact re: Mr. McCollom. See Additional Material Facts. Motion for Summary Adjudication is Denied. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Defendant to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). =(501/REQ)
